title: Shelling near civilians
description: Katsapnya killed a 12-year-old girl in Kyiv - this is the fifth victim of the night shelling, - Klitschko According to him, there are still people under the rubble.

title: Missile attack
description: There will be a fair response to all Russian attacks, - Zelenskyi He also noted that during the last attacks it was possible to shoot down a significant number of missiles and drones: the total percentage of downed targets is 93%.
description_en: There will be a fair response to all Russian attacks, - Zelenskyi He also noted that during the last attacks it was possible to shoot down a significant number of missiles and drones: the total percentage of downed targets is 93%.
description_uk: На все российские удары последует справедливый ответ, - Зеленский Он также отметил, что во время последних атак удалось сбить значительное количество ракет и дронов: общий процент сбитых целей - 93%.

title: Kherson: Attack attack on residential area
title_en: Kherson: Attack attack on residential area
description: As of now, five people are known to have died in Kyiv due to the nighttime Russian attack. My condolences to family and friends. About 40 people were injured in the capital. Another seven people were injured in Kyiv region. There are already 28 victims in Kharkiv. Two people were injured in Odesa region. A total of 180 objects were damaged across the country, and more than 50 of them were ordinary residential buildings. The search and rescue operation is still ongoing...
description_en: As of now, five people are known to have died in Kyiv due to the nighttime Russian attack. My condolences to family and friends. About 40 people were injured in the capital. Another seven people were injured in Kyiv region. There are already 28 victims in Kharkiv. Two people were injured in Odesa region. A total of 180 objects were damaged across the country, and more than 50 of them were ordinary residential buildings. The search and rescue operation is still ongoing...
description_uk: Станом на зараз відомо вже про п’ятьох загиблих у Києві через нічну російську атаку. Мої співчуття рідним і близьким. Близько 40 людей було поранено у столиці. Ще семеро людей поранено на Київщині. У Харкові вже 28 постраждалих. Двоє людей поранено в Одеській області. Загалом 180 об’єктів пошкоджено по країні, і з них лише звичайних житлових будинків понад 50. Зараз іще триває пошуково-рятувальна...

title: Kyiv: Casualties reported

description: The unraveling of Andriy Yermak Ukrainian president’s former right-hand man, Andriy Yermak, has descended from power to the courtroom, being implicated in a major corruption case. After a three-day-long hearing, on May 14, the High Anti-Corruption Court placed Yermak in custody for two months and set bail at Hr 140 million ($3.1 million). At least for the time being, Yermak will spend his time...

title: Kyiv: 56 missiles launched
description: A rescue operation is currently underway in Kyiv at the site of a Russian drone attack on a nine-story residential building - the entrance to the building has been completely destroyed. Dozens of people were saved. Unfortunately, one person died. My condolences to family and friends. There may still be people under the rubble. Overnight, the Russians launched more than 670 attack drones and 56 missiles over Ukraine. There were ballistic, aeroballistic, winged...
description_en: A rescue operation is currently underway in Kyiv at the site of a Russian drone attack on a nine-story residential building - the entrance to the building has been completely destroyed. Overnight, the Russians launched more than 670 attack drones and 56 missiles over Ukraine. There were ballistic, aeroballistic, winged...
description_uk: Зараз у Києві триває рятувальна операція на місці російського дронового удару по житловій девʼятиповерхівці – у будинку повністю зруйновано підʼїзд. Врятовано десятки людей. На жаль, одна людина загинула. Мої співчуття рідним і близьким. Під завалами ще можуть бути люди. За ніч росіяни випустили по Україні понад 670 ударних дронів і 56 ракет. Були удари балістикою, аеробалістикою, крилатими...

title: Kursk: 41 missiles + 800 drones intercepted
description: 41 MISSILES AND 652 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of May 14 (from 18:00 on May 13), immediately after a massive strike by drones during the day (almost 800 UAVs), the enemy continued the attack, launching a combined attack on Ukraine using UAVs, air and ground-based missiles. ❗️ The main direction of the attack is Kyiv. In total, radio engineering troops of the Air Force recorded...

Усього радіотехнічними військами Повітряних Сил зафіксовано...

title: 56 missiles + 675 drones intercepted
description: That night, the air defense forces shot down 652 out of 675 UAVs and 41 out of 56 missiles, - the Armed Forces of the Ukrainian Armed Forces. Hits were recorded in 24 places, the attack continues.
description_en: That night, the air defense forces shot down 652 out of 675 UAVs and 41 out of 56 missiles, - the Armed Forces of the Ukrainian Armed Forces. Hits were recorded in 24 places, the attack continues.

title: Kyiv: Missile launch detected
description: Update: 1 killed, 16 injured in Kyiv as Russia's mass daytime attack continues overnight, causing building collapse. title: Kyiv: 14 killed, 80 injured
description: Update: At least 14 killed, over 80 injured in one of 'longest mass attacks' of Russia's war against Ukraine. Russian forces launched hundreds of drones across Ukraine on the afternoon of May 13, targeting regions far from the front lines and damaging homes, critical infrastructure, and energy facilities across the country. Photo: Svilana Olynshchuk / Telegram
